items.br: Extrai as origens (sources) dos lançamentos contábeis, como Payables, Receivables, Assets, Manual, etc. Permite identificar de qual módulo ou sistema cada lançamento se originou, essencial para rastreabilidade, reconciliação intermodular e auditoria.
items.en: Extract the sources (origins) of accounting entries, such as Payables, Receivables, Assets, Manual, etc. This allows you to identify the module or system from which each entry originated, which is essential for traceability, inter-module reconciliation, and auditing.
items.es: Extrae las fuentes (sources) de las transacciones contables, como "Payables", "Receivables", "Assets", "Manual", etc. Permite identificar de qué módulo o sistema proviene cada transacción, lo cual es esencial para el rastreo, la conciliación intermodular y la auditoría.
